description: §23.6 positive — a library file with exactly ONE top-level `<foreign lang="ts" />` declaration. Since the file declares one (not zero, not two-plus) foreign-language context and no `<program>`, neither the duplicate check nor the in-program check has anything to fire on: E-FOREIGN-LANG-DUPLICATE and E-FOREIGN-LANG-IN-PROGRAM both stay silent (type-system.ts checkForeignLangLibraryDecl).
